name: Tex-Mex Taco Pizza

3. Take a skillet and heat oil.
4. Add cumin, onion, smoked paprika, and garlic powder, then cook for
5. Mix beef and salt, and cook for 3 more minutes until brown.

method: Put beef in a skillet over the high heat; add taco seasoning in it.
Cook until it is brown, then drain and set aside.
Assemble burritos by putting flour tortilla in the microwave for
Put a layer of refried beans, cheese, and then cooked beef on it.
Fold the sides and bottom of the tortilla.
Wrap it in a parchment paper; if you like to store in the refrigerator
To serve and eat, wrap it in the paper towel; microwave for around 2-
3 minutes, set it aside for almost one minute.
Remove stems from mushroom caps; cut into slices.
Slice bell pepper and red onion.
Take a skillet, and heat oil over the medium heat.
Put black beans, garlic powder, onion powder, cumin, paprika, lime
juice, kosher salt, and some water. Cook until liquid evaporates.
Add kosher salt to the mashed avocado.
To assemble tortilla, put 1/2 cup of rice on it. Top with the bean
Fold in all sides of burritos.
Take a skillet, and heat oil over the medium heat.
Put taco seasoning and beef in it—season with pepper and salt.
Drain fat from beef and put it back to skillet.
Put back beans and corn, and cook for 2 minutes.
Turn off the heat and take it out in a bowl.
Add shredded cheddar, green pepper, and tomato in it.
Put the mixture and the egg roll wrapper in the center. Roll it, and
continue this process with all burrito mixture and egg roll wrappers.
Take a skillet, and heat oil over the medium heat.
Fry each side of egg roll until it is golden brown.
Turn off the heat; drain the fat.
Repeat the process with other egg rolls.
